title: Alternate Mace
description: Gives the mace a 3d model when it's held.
body:
With this pack installed, the mace will be rendered as 3d model when held by players, but it will still show up as its sprite in the GUI, or when dropped on the ground or displayed on an item frame. 

I wasn't quite satisfied with how other packs represent the item, with the mace looking too big. So if you had that same impression, you might like this pack.
